subcodes.title: Words to Louis Gregory, spoken on 1911-04-11
subcodes.first_line: The best means is to accept this Cause. All differences must fade among believers. In the present antagonism there is great danger to both races. Intermarriage is a good way to efface racial differences.
subcodes.subjects: @race unity; racial issues, @laws of marriage and dowry, @unity; oneness of humanity
